name: RTB101
summary: Catalytic mTOR inhibitor tested in older adults for respiratory-infection and antiviral immune-function endpoints, with a phase 2b signal but a phase 3 miss.
mechanism_summary: Low-dose TORC1 inhibition intended to upregulate interferon-stimulated antiviral gene programs and reduce respiratory infections in older adults.

open_questions: Why the phase 2b respiratory-infection signal did not replicate in the phase 3 clinically symptomatic respiratory-illness endpoint
Whether the useful signal depends on endpoint definition, dose, combination partner, or participant risk profile
Whether antiviral gene-expression movement is sufficient to justify an immune-rejuvenation framing
